title: ElroNd's Transparent Hotbar
description: Another Transparent Hotbar Resource Pack that supports off-hand. Inspired by MrCrayfish videos. 1.21+
body:
# Transparent Hotbar

This resource pack makes the hotbar (including both left and right off-hand slots) fully transparent while keeping the selection outline, experience bar, hunger bar, and hearts unchanged. Since these elements remain unmodified, you can use this resource pack on top of others to customize them separately.

# Examples

## Transparent Hotbar

![](https://i.imgur.com/27p0PB0.png)

## Transparent Hotbar with [Cobblemon Interface](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cobblemon-interface)
